title: Cold start loads dashboard and reaches connected live state
description: Verifies the app loads the default Digital Twin view, completes the initial snapshot load, connects to live updates, and shows a connected status with visible live data.

steps.description: Navigate to the app root route
Wait for the initial loading state to finish
Verify the topbar live status indicates a connected state
Verify the Digital Twin view displays zone and equipment information

title: Live status reflects connecting to connected lifecycle
description: Verifies the status pill transitions through connection lifecycle states during initial load to reach a connected state.

steps.description: Navigate to the app root route
Wait for the topbar live status to indicate a connecting state
Wait for the topbar live status to indicate a connected state
Verify the app indicates it is connected to live updates

title: Sidebar tab switching preserves mounted view state
description: Verifies switching between sidebar views does not reset the previously mounted Digital Twin view state when returning.

steps.description: Navigate to the app root route
Wait for the initial loading state to finish
Trigger a user-visible state change on the Digital Twin view (such as expanding a panel or toggling an available view control)
Click the sidebar navigation item for another view
Click the sidebar navigation item to return to the Digital Twin view
Verify the previously changed Digital Twin UI state is preserved

title: Auto-reconnect restores live connected state after an unexpected disconnect
description: Verifies that after the live connection drops, the app transitions to reconnecting and returns to a connected state with live updates resuming.

steps.description: Navigate to the app root route
Wait for the topbar live status to indicate a connected state
Wait for the app to enter a reconnecting state after a connection drop occurs in the environment
Wait for the topbar live status to return to a connected state
Verify the app is connected again and the live monitoring UI is functioning

title: Digital Twin renders live snapshot and updates visualizations over time
description: Verifies the Digital Twin view renders zone temperature mapping and equipment status from the initial snapshot and continues updating from live snapshots.

steps.description: Navigate to the app root route
Wait for the initial loading state to finish
Wait for the topbar live status to indicate a connected state
Wait long enough for at least one subsequent live update to be received
Verify the 3D viewer and floor-plan overlay are displayed with zone and equipment information
Verify the displayed live zone/equipment state updates over time

title: Receives streaming updates without interrupting the current view
description: Verifies that while connected, repeated live snapshot updates are applied and the current page remains stable and interactive.

steps.description: Navigate to the app root route
Wait for the topbar live status to indicate a connected state
Wait long enough for multiple live updates to be received
Verify the Digital Twin view continues to display live zone/equipment data without breaking or resetting

title: Shows disconnected status when live connection is unavailable and last-known data remains usable
description: Verifies that when the app cannot establish live connectivity, the topbar shows a disconnected state while the UI remains usable with last-known snapshot data.

steps.description: Navigate to the app root route
Wait for the app to finish attempting to initialize live monitoring
Verify the topbar live status indicates a disconnected state
Verify the main dashboard content still renders with a usable snapshot view or an appropriate empty-state

title: Simulation baseline comparison displays delta alongside live updates
description: Verifies requesting the simulation baseline displays the delta comparison UI while the live stream continues updating without breaking the comparison view.

steps.description: Navigate to the app root route
Wait for the initial loading state to finish
Wait for the topbar live status to indicate a connected state
Trigger loading of the simulation baseline comparison
Wait for the simulation comparison to finish loading
Verify a simulation delta comparison bar is displayed
Verify the live monitoring UI continues updating while the delta comparison remains visible

title: Backoff retry eventually reconnects after initial connection failure
description: Verifies that when the initial live connection attempt fails, the client retries with backoff and can later establish a connected live state.

steps.description: Navigate to the app root route
Wait for the topbar live status to indicate a disconnected or retrying state
Wait for the app to retry connecting
Verify the topbar live status eventually indicates a connected state

title: Open Predictive Maintenance and view an equipment health summary
description: Verifies the user can open Predictive Maintenance and see equipment listed with health/status indicators.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Predictive Maintenance view
Wait for equipment data to finish loading
Verify an equipment list/tree is displayed
Verify at least one equipment health/status indicator is displayed

title: Malformed live snapshot degrades gracefully and manual refresh recovers
description: Verifies that when malformed live snapshot data is encountered, the dashboard remains usable using the last good snapshot and a manual refresh restores a corrected view.

steps.description: Navigate to the app root route
Wait for the initial loading state to finish
Wait for the app to indicate a live update parsing problem in a non-blocking way (if surfaced)
Trigger a manual refresh of the snapshot data
Wait for refresh loading to finish
Verify the dashboard renders zone and equipment information after refresh

title: View 24h and 7d historical report charts
description: Verifies the user can open Building Report and switch from 24h to 7d range and the charts render for each range.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Building Report view
Select the 24h range
Wait for the report data to finish loading
Select the 7d range
Wait for the report data to finish loading
Verify performance and savings charts are displayed for the selected range

title: Select an AHU and view 24h equipment timeline
description: Verifies the user can select an AHU in the TreeView and load the 24h timeline chart for that equipment.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Predictive Maintenance view
Wait for equipment data to finish loading
Select the AHU-1 equipment in the tree
Select the 24h timeline range for the equipment
Wait for the equipment timeline to finish loading
Verify the equipment detail panel is displayed for the selected asset
Verify a 24h timeline chart is displayed

title: Switch 7d to 30d and verify report updates
description: Verifies the user can switch from 7d to 30d and the report refreshes to show updated chart data for the new range.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Building Report view
Select the 7d range
Wait for the report data to finish loading
Select the 30d range
Wait for the report data to finish loading
Verify the report charts reflect the newly selected range

title: Preserve TreeView selection when switching away and back
description: Verifies the selected equipment remains selected and its details remain visible after switching to another view and returning.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Predictive Maintenance view
Wait for equipment data to finish loading
Select the AHU-1 equipment in the tree
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Building Report view
Click the sidebar/tab to return to the Predictive Maintenance view
Verify the previously selected equipment is still selected
Verify the asset detail panel is still showing the selected equipment

title: Keep the selected report range when switching away and back
description: Verifies the app preserves the Building Report selected range and view state when navigating away and returning via sidebar tabs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Building Report view
Select the 30d range
Wait for the report data to finish loading
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Predictive Maintenance view
Click the sidebar/tab to return to the Building Report view
Verify the report is still showing the previously selected 30d range

title: Handle zero-only savings data with guidance and allow retry
description: Verifies that when savings data is empty/zero-only the report shows guidance and the user can retry with a broader range.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Building Report view
Select the 7d range
Wait for the report data to finish loading
Verify a no-savings-data guidance message is visible
Select the 30d range
Wait for the report data to finish loading
Verify savings chart data is displayed

title: Show and clear loading state when switching report ranges
description: Verifies that changing the report range shows a loading state and then returns to a loaded chart view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Building Report view
Select the 24h range
Wait for the report data to finish loading
Select the 7d range
Verify a loading indicator is visible for the report
Wait for the report data to finish loading
Verify the loading indicator is no longer visible and charts are displayed

title: Display heatmap and benchmark comparisons for a selected range
description: Verifies the Building Report view displays the thermal heatmap and benchmark comparisons for the selected time range.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Building Report view
Select the 24h range
Wait for the report data to finish loading
Verify a thermal heatmap is displayed
Verify benchmark comparison data is displayed

title: Show offline guidance for an unknown equipment asset
description: Verifies the user can attempt to view an unknown asset and the UI shows an offline/not-found remediation state rather than a broken detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar/tab to open the Predictive Maintenance view
Wait for equipment data to finish loading
Use the equipment selection UI to navigate to an asset with id chiller-2 if available
Wait for the asset detail area to update
Verify the asset detail area indicates the asset is offline or unavailable with remediation guidance
